title: crotalaria brevicornuta
intro: Crotalaria brevicornuta, also known as the short-horned rattle pod, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to Africa. The medicinal properties of Crotalaria brevicornuta include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections. Crotalaria brevicornuta can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
